narration: mRNA vaccines don’t rewrite your DNA — they deliver temporary instructions.
visual_description: Hook visual: mRNA vaccines don’t rewrite your DNA — they deliver temporary instructions.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: mRNA vaccines don’t rewrite your DNA — they deliver temporary instructions.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: mRNA vaccines don’t rewrite your DNA — they deliver temporary instructions.

narration: Inside your body, tiny lipid nanoparticles act like delivery trucks, bringing mRNA straight to your cells.
visual_description: Context visual: Inside your body, tiny lipid nanoparticles act like delivery trucks, bringing mRNA straight to your cells.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Inside your body, tiny lipid nanoparticles act like delivery trucks, bringing mRNA straight to your cells.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Inside your body, tiny lipid nanoparticles act like delivery trucks, bringing mRNA straight to your cells.

narration: These mRNA strands provide instructions to make a harmless piece of the virus — just enough to train your immune system.
visual_description: Escalation visual: These mRNA strands provide instructions to make a harmless piece of the virus — just enough to train your immune system.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: These mRNA strands provide instructions to make a harmless piece of the virus — just enough to train your immune system.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: These mRNA strands provide instructions to make a harmless piece of the virus — just enough to train your immune system.

narration: Research shows these instructions never integrate into your DNA, ensuring your genetic code remains untouched.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Research shows these instructions never integrate into your DNA, ensuring your genetic code remains untouched.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Research shows these instructions never integrate into your DNA, ensuring your genetic code remains untouched.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Research shows these instructions never integrate into your DNA, ensuring your genetic code remains untouched.

narration: Instead, they teach your immune system to recognize the virus, preparing it for a real encounter.
visual_description: Payoff visual: Instead, they teach your immune system to recognize the virus, preparing it for a real encounter.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: Instead, they teach your immune system to recognize the virus, preparing it for a real encounter.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: Instead, they teach your immune system to recognize the virus, preparing it for a real encounter.
